news.headline: US-Iran tensions: Oman's explosion hit oil terminal resumes operations as Hezbollah and Israel trade fresh strikes
news.summary: US-Iran tensions: Oman's explosion hit oil terminal resumes operations as Hezbollah and Israel trade fresh strikes

news.headline: What To Know as China’s Xi Jinping Heads to North Korea
news.summary: As Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang, he faces an emboldened North Korean dictator, whose alliance with Russia has reduced his dependence on China.

news.headline: IHC seeks answers on action under ‘Zainab’ child protection law
